text: The farmer drives a red tractor on the farm every day.

text: We had to postpone the meeting until next week.

text: What is the date of your birthday this year?

text: What is your preference for breakfast food?

text: This cafe will provide free coffee for everyone.

text: She works at a large corporate office in town.

text: Our school has strong rules and discipline.

text: The sky today is mostly blue with some clouds.

text: He is a man of strong integrity.
chinese_text: 他是一个品格坚定的人。

text: Please stack these books on the shelf.
chinese_text: 请把这些书摞在书架上。

text: I want to become a teacher one day.

text: I finished my homework assignment last night.

text: The phone begins to ring very loudly now.
chinese_text: 电话现在开始大声响起来。

text: We had a romantic dinner by candlelight at home.

text: The new law will empower the people to vote.

text: I forbid you to go outside alone today.
chinese_text: 我不允许你今天独自外出。

text: He is a kind gentleman who helps others.

text: What inference can you make from this simple story?

text: I really like that new brand of shoes.
chinese_text: 我非常喜欢那个新品牌的鞋。

text: The old cathedral is very tall and looks beautiful.

text: Study hard lest you fail the big test.

text: Please read the work contract before you sign it.

text: She wore a red cloak to the cold party.

text: The school report is due tomorrow afternoon.

text: Can you approximate the number of people here today?

chinese_text: 他爬上梯子修理屋顶。

text: This finding has great significance for our group.

text: Don't make a big fuss over small problems.
chinese_text: 不要为小事大惊小怪。

text: She gave me a frown when I came in.
chinese_text: 我进来时她对我皱了皱眉。

text: The recession hurt many small businesses last year.
chinese_text: 经济衰退去年损害了许多小企业。

text: I want to travel across Europe next summer.
chinese_text: 我想明年夏天去欧洲旅行。

text: Please cut the onion into small pieces for me.

text: I have a pen with blue ink inside.

text: A troop of soldiers marched by my house today.
chinese_text: 今天一队士兵经过我家。

text: Every choice you make has a real consequence.

text: The heart is an important organ inside your body.

text: Please drain the water from the kitchen sink.
chinese_text: 请把厨房水槽里的水排掉。

text: You may sit down now if you feel tired.
chinese_text: 如果你累了，现在可以坐下。

text: Her laughter filled the whole room with joy.
chinese_text: 她的笑声让整个房间充满了欢乐。

text: I made this birthday cake all by myself.

text: This is a holy place where people pray.

text: That was a very painful fall on the ice.

text: We lack the time to finish the project today.

text: Each person is unique in their own way.

text: The deep forest looks very mysterious at night.

chinese_text: 这是我们学校普通的一天。

text: Don't assume he is late; he might be on his way.

text: She is able to swim very well in the pool.

chinese_text: 花园周围有高大的绿色树篱。

text: The company spent over a billion dollars last year.
chinese_text: 这家公司去年花费了超过十亿美元。

text: I will reserve a table at the restaurant for tonight.

chinese_text: 医生今天早上仔细检查了我的心率。

text: The train platform was crowded with commuters heading into the city during rush hour.
chinese_text: 高峰时段,火车站台上挤满了进城的通勤者。

text: The old railroad tracks have been converted into a scenic walking path through the countryside.
chinese_text: 古老的铁轨已被改造成穿越乡村的风景步道。

text: The online platform helps residents connect with others in their city through community forums.
chinese_text: 这个在线平台帮助居民通过社区论坛与同城的人建立联系。

text: The architect's impressive designs have won numerous international awards for their innovative use of sustainable materials.
chinese_text: 那位建筑师令人印象深刻的设计凭借其对可持续材料的创新运用赢得了众多国际大奖。

text: Despite the heavy subject matter, the documentary remained thoroughly entertaining through clever editing and witty narration.
chinese_text: 尽管主题沉重，这部纪录片通过巧妙的剪辑和诙谐的旁白始终保持着极高的娱乐性。

text: The new wearable device monitors heart rate, sleep patterns, and oxygen saturation with remarkable precision throughout the day.
chinese_text: 这款新型可穿戴设备能够以非凡的精确度全天候监测心率、睡眠模式和血氧饱和度。

text: Only candidates who pass the rigorous entrance examination will qualify for the prestigious graduate program at the university.
chinese_text: 只有通过严格入学考试的考生才有资格进入这所大学的著名研究生项目。

text: She was thrilled to join the research team after months of deliberation about which opportunity aligned best with her career.
chinese_text: 经过数月的深思熟虑，她欣然加入了研究团队，选择了最契合职业发展的机会。

text: The rare bird was spotted nesting in the cliff face, drawing ornithologists from across Europe to observe its behavior.
chinese_text: 这种珍稀鸟类被发现栖息于悬崖之上，吸引了来自欧洲各地前来观察其行为的鸟类学家。

text: The prisoners were confined to their cells for twenty-three hours each day under the new restrictive security protocol.
chinese_text: 在新实施的安全管控之下，囚犯们每天被限制在牢房中长达二十三个小时。

text: Her favourite pastime involves restoring vintage furniture and uncovering the hidden stories behind each piece's craftsmanship.
chinese_text: 她最喜爱的消遣是修复古董家具，并挖掘每件作品工艺背后鲜为人知的故事。

text: What may seem like a marvelous coincidence to outsiders is actually the result of years of meticulous planning.
chinese_text: 在局外人看来似乎是奇妙巧合的事件，实际上是多年精心规划的必然结果。

text: The wind threatened to shear the roof off the old farmhouse during the worst storm in a decade.
chinese_text: 在这十年来最猛烈的风暴中，强风几乎要将那座老农舍的屋顶整个掀翻。

text: His inability to delegate effectively proved to be his ultimate downfall as the company expanded into new markets.
chinese_text: 随着公司向新市场扩张，他无法有效委派任务的缺陷最终成为他败落的根源。

text: The strenuous climb up the mountain was enough to exhaust even the most seasoned of experienced hikers.
chinese_text: 即使是最有经验的登山者，也会被那次陡峭的攀登消耗得筋疲力尽。

text: The rival company's sudden price reduction forced us to reconsider our entire pricing strategy before the holiday season.
chinese_text: 竞争对手公司突然降价，迫使我们在节假日前重新审视整体定价策略。

text: In case of emergency, all passengers should proceed calmly to the nearest exit indicated by the illuminated green signs.
chinese_text: 一旦发生紧急情况，所有乘客应保持冷静，前往由绿色指示灯标识的最近出口。

text: Could you fetch the documents from the archive room before the meeting begins at three o'clock this afternoon?
chinese_text: 能否在下午三点的会议开始前，从档案室把那些文件取过来？

text: He bitterly regretted his harsh words the moment they had left his mouth, knowing he could never retrieve them.
chinese_text: 他在尖刻的话语刚脱口而出的瞬间便深感懊悔，因为他知道再也收不回来了。

text: The mistress of the estate welcomed each guest personally, ensuring every comfort was provided during their extended stay.
chinese_text: 庄园的女主人亲自迎接每一位宾客，确保他们在逗留期间得到无微不至的照顾。

text: Many historians argue that the alleged curse of the pharaoh was merely a modern invention to deter grave robbers.
chinese_text: 许多历史学家认为，法老的所谓诅咒不过是现代人为了阻吓盗墓者而杜撰的传闻。

text: The organic fertilizer derived from composted kitchen waste has significantly improved the yield of our vegetable garden.
chinese_text: 由厨房废料堆肥制成的有机肥料显著地提高了我们菜园的产量。

text: The witness took a solemn oath to affirm the truthfulness of every statement made during the lengthy testimony.
chinese_text: 那位证人在庄严的誓言下誓言在冗长的证词中确证每一句话的真实性。

text: Given the economic downturn, their demand for a substantial pay increase seemed neither reasonable nor feasible at this juncture.
chinese_text: 考虑到经济低迷，他们要求大幅加薪的诉求在此刻既不合理也难以实现。

text: A fierce debate erupted among the board members regarding whether to expand operations into the volatile overseas markets.
chinese_text: 在是否进入波动剧烈的海外市场扩张业务的问题上，董事会成员间爆发了激烈的争论。

text: The most influential food critic in the city could make or break a restaurant's reputation with a single review.
chinese_text: 城里最有影响力的美食评论家仅凭一篇评论便能决定一家餐厅的声誉。

text: Explorers discovered an enormous underground cave containing prehistoric paintings dating back over thirty thousand years.
chinese_text: 探险者发现了一处巨大的地下洞穴，洞内保存着距今超过三万年的史前壁画。

text: Could you please turn the volume down so I can concentrate on the report without being distracted by the chatter?
chinese_text: 请把音量调低一些好吗？这样我才能专心写报告，不被周围的闲聊干扰。

text: It took the rescue team hours to locate the missing hikers stranded on the steep northern slope of the mountain.
chinese_text: 救援队花了数小时才找到被困在陡峭北坡上的失踪徒步旅行者。

text: She struggled to find the rhythm of the unfamiliar dance, missing steps and apologizing to her partner repeatedly.
chinese_text: 她多次尝试仍无法跟上这支陌生舞曲的节奏，连连踩错节拍并向舞伴不断致歉。

text: His seasoned opponent had won three championships in a row and showed no signs of slowing down before the match.
chinese_text: 他那经验老到的对手已经连续赢得三届冠军，赛前丝毫没有显现出疲态。

text: The gloomy weather put everyone in a somber mood, dampening the festive atmosphere of the outdoor gathering.
chinese_text: 阴郁的天气让所有人都陷入沉闷的心情，户外聚会的欢乐气氛因此大为减色。

text: It took him several attempts to grasp the complex mathematical concept underlying the groundbreaking physics theory.
chinese_text: 他耗费多次努力才掌握了支撑这一突破性物理理论的复杂数学概念。

text: The marketing budget was slashed in half after the quarterly profits fell short of the investors' projected expectations.
chinese_text: 在季度利润未达投资者预期后，营销预算被大幅削减了一半。

text: It is absolutely necessary that all participants submit their completed forms before the registration deadline closes tomorrow.
chinese_text: 所有参与者务必在注册截止之前提交填写完整的表格，这一点绝对必要。

text: The professor's engaging lectures consistently drew maximum attendance from students across multiple disciplines and academic departments.
chinese_text: 这位教授的授课引人入胜，始终吸引着来自多个学科和院系的最大规模学生出席。

text: Please do not interrupt the speaker during the presentation; save your questions for the designated Q&A session afterward.
chinese_text: 在演示进行期间请勿打断发言者；请把问题留到之后安排的问答环节再提出。

text: She enrolled in an advanced writing class to refine her prose style and explore more sophisticated narrative techniques.
chinese_text: 她报名参加了一门高级写作课程，希望打磨自己的散文风格并探索更精妙的叙事手法。

text: Our collective efforts over the past decade have contributed significantly to the conservation of endangered marine species.
chinese_text: 我们过去十年的共同努力已对濒危海洋生物的保护事业作出了重大贡献。

text: She decided to fry the freshly caught trout in a light batter of seasoned flour and herbs from her garden.
chinese_text: 她决定用自家花园里的香草和调过味的面粉调成轻盈的面糊来油炸那条刚钓上的鳟鱼。

text: The dancer managed to execute the complicated routine flawlessly despite the pressure of performing before a live audience.
chinese_text: 尽管顶着在观众面前现场表演的压力，那位舞者依然毫无瑕疵地完成了整套复杂的舞蹈动作。

text: The company reduced its carbon emissions by twenty percent, thereby meeting the stringent environmental regulations imposed by the government.
chinese_text: 公司将其碳排放量减少了百分之二十，由此达到了政府所制定的严格环保法规要求。

text: One significant disadvantage of working remotely is the lack of spontaneous collaboration that typically occurs in office environments.
chinese_text: 远程办公的一个显著弊端在于，通常发生在办公室中的自发性合作机会大为减少。

text: The candidate demonstrated multiple transferable skills during the interview, impressing the hiring panel with her diverse background.
chinese_text: 那位候选人在面试中展示了多重可迁移技能，凭借她多元的背景给招聘小组留下了深刻印象。

text: She wrapped herself in a soft wool blanket before settling down with a novel by the crackling fireplace.
chinese_text: 她裹上一条柔软的羊毛毯，在噼啪作响的壁炉前安逸地捧起一本小说细细品读。

text: The jury deliberated for three days before reaching a unanimous verdict in the highly publicized corporate fraud case.
chinese_text: 陪审团历经三天的合议，终于在这起备受关注的企业欺诈案中达成了一致裁决。

text: The instructions were clearly written at the back of the manual, prompting numerous complaints from confused first-time users.
chinese_text: 使用说明虽然清楚地写在手册的背面，但仍引起了众多初次用户的困惑和抱怨。

text: Implementing automated workflows significantly boosted the team's efficiency, allowing them to complete projects well ahead of schedule.
chinese_text: 实施自动化工作流程显著地提升了团队效率，使他们得以大幅提前完成项目。

text: The artist insisted on using only original materials sourced locally, rejecting any synthetic substitutes offered by commercial suppliers.
chinese_text: 那位艺术家坚持只使用本地采购的原始材料，拒绝了任何由商业供应商提供的合成替代品。

text: The aftermath of the hurricane was simply awful, leaving entire neighborhoods submerged and families displaced from their homes.
chinese_text: 飓风过后的景象简直糟糕透顶，整片街区被水淹没，无数家庭流离失所。

text: The harsh reality of the situation became apparent once the initial optimism had faded and the facts emerged.
chinese_text: 随着最初的乐观情绪消退、事实浮现，局势的严酷现实才逐渐清晰地显露出来。

text: The corresponding increase in demand necessitated a proportional expansion of our production capacity to maintain customer satisfaction.
chinese_text: 需求的相应增加迫使我们按比例扩大产能，以维持客户的满意度。

text: The joint statement issued by both governments emphasized the urgent need for collaborative action against cross-border cyber threats.
chinese_text: 两国政府发表的联合声明强调，针对跨境网络威胁采取协作行动已迫在眉睫。
